title: SpaceAPI Directory Entry Structure
description: JSON structure documentation for the SpaceAPI Collector directory response

fields.name: items
fields.description: List of all registered spaces in the SpaceAPI directory

fields.name: url
fields.description: URL to the space's SpaceAPI JSON endpoint

fields.name: valid
fields.description: Whether the space's endpoint provides a valid SpaceAPI JSON file

fields.name: space
fields.description: The display name of the hackerspace or makerspace

fields.name: lastSeen
fields.description: Unix timestamp of last successful reachability check

fields.name: errMsg
fields.description: Error message if an issue was found with the endpoint

fields.name: data
fields.description: Raw JSON payload from last successful scrape of the space's endpoint
